name: num-parks
description: Number of calisthenics parks in the programme

name: refugees-per-group
description: Migrant participants per park

name: locals-per-group
description: Local participants per park (Baseline); Suboptimal Composition manipulation reduces to 1 per park

name: sessions-per-week
description: Training sessions per week

name: session-duration-hours
description: Duration of each training session

name: group-target-size
description: Target training group size

name: annual-budget-per-park
description: Annual EUR budget per park (used by cost-per-retained calculation)

name: indoor-season-start
description: Winter-season onset week (weeks 9-28 are indoor season)

name: indoor-season-end
description: Winter-season end week

name: motivation-decay-rate
description: Gamma: baseline motivation decay rate

name: peer-influence-coefficient
description: Beta: peer-reinforced motivation coupling coefficient

name: motivation-boost-per-session
description: Motivation increment per attended session

name: dropout-threshold
description: theta_d: motivation threshold below which dropout activates

name: tie-formation-probability
description: p_tie: tie formation probability per session

name: refugee-initial-tie-probability
description: Probability each refugee starts with one same-park tie

name: local-initial-tie-probability
description: Probability each local starts with one same-park tie

name: initial-tie-strength
description: Strength assigned to initial ties at t=0

name: tie-strength-growth
description: Tie strength increment when both ends co-attend

name: language-gain-rate-per-hour
description: Lambda: base language gain per training hour

name: language-efficiency-multiplier
description: Eta: informal-context discount factor for language gain

name: language-friendship-multiplier
description: Phi_friend: peer translation bonus when local friend attends

name: prior-exercise-probability
description: Proportion of agents with prior exercise experience

name: arrival-cohort-mean-months
description: Mean months-in-country for migrants

name: indoor-facility-probability
description: Probability each park has an indoor winter partner facility; NoIndoor scenarios set to 0.0; Winter50 sets to 0.5

name: refugee-initial-childcare-prob
description: Proportion of refugees with childcare at t=0

name: refugee-initial-transport-prob
description: Proportion of refugees with transport access at t=0

name: local-initial-childcare-prob
description: Proportion of locals with childcare at t=0

name: local-initial-transport-prob
description: Proportion of locals with transport access at t=0

name: distance-penalty-500m
description: Attendance multiplier for distances 5-7.5 patches

name: female-outdoor-safety-prob
description: Probability of safety-penalty trigger for women during outdoor season

name: female-outdoor-safety-multiplier
description: Attendance multiplier when female outdoor safety penalty triggers

name: dropout-prob-motivation
description: Per-week dropout probability when motivation below threshold and not attending

name: dropout-prob-work-refugee
description: Per-week work-conflict dropout probability (refugees without stipend)

name: dropout-prob-work-local
description: Per-week work-conflict dropout probability (locals without stipend)

name: dropout-prob-winter
description: Per-week winter-pause probability for agents at parks without indoor facility

name: dropout-prob-distance-refugee
description: Per-week distance dropout probability (refugees beyond 5 patches without transport)

name: dropout-prob-distance-local
description: Per-week distance dropout probability (locals beyond 5 patches without transport)

name: reentry-prob-base
description: Base spring re-entry probability for winter-paused agents

name: reentry-prob-cap
description: Maximum spring re-entry probability (capped regardless of friend count)

name: winter-no-return-threshold-weeks
description: Weeks of failed re-entry attempts before permanent dropout

name: interaction-quality-floor
description: Minimum value of interaction-quality when computing language gain

name: weak-peer-beta
description: Override value of peer-influence-coefficient under Weak Peer Influence scenario

name: inflow-rate-per-week
description: Weekly Bernoulli probability of 1 new refugee arrival (0 = closed population; OpenPopulation scenario sets to 0.30)

name: outflow-rate-per-week
description: Weekly Bernoulli probability of 1 random active-refugee departure (0 = closed population; OpenPopulation scenario sets to 0.20)
